dialogos.texto_en: (Oh?\n Who's that over there...?)
Hey, what are you doing in this little corner?
HYAA?!
Uwaaa?!
U-Uesugi-kun!\nPlease don't talk to us all of a sudden like that!
That SHOCKED me, wow.
I'm the one who was shocked...
And, hm? You're alone?\nYou're not with Yotsuba, huh.
Yeah, I guess.\nGot a problem with that?
I can't really tell\nif that's a good thing or a bad thing.
They're not making any progress at all.\nThey're just maintaining at this point.\nThis is enough to say there's a problem.
Hey, what are you two talking about?
Oh no, nothing.
Meow.
Oh? A cat?\nOh, you were playing with it.
Yeah, it's cute, right?
Cute, more like...round.
W-well, that's cute, too.
Sorry this man was so rude to you, Maya-chan, meow.\nPlease forgive him, meow.
Meow, meow.
Teehee, what a clever kitty.
Is this cat's name Maya?
No, I don't know her real name.
They call cats 'Maya' in the Okinawan language,\nso we're just calling it Maya-chan (temporarily).
That's pretty crude...\nAlso, including 'meow' at the end of the sentences\nis pretty crude, too.
It's okay, Maya-chan likes it.\nJust look.
Here's some pets, Maya-chan, you're such a good kitty.
Meooow, meeeoww.
Hey, that's not fair,\nwhy do you get to pet Maya all the time.\nLet me have a turn too.
What a well-behaved cat.\nMaybe she's used to being touched by tourists?
Perhaps she's the mascot for some shop.
With such a magnificent physique,\nare you eating delicious Okinawan fish every day?
Meow.
Isn't this cat eating a bit too much?
Yeah, I'm a bit concerned about that.
Maya-chan, you might want to go on a diet,\nmeow?
Meowww...
Ahaha, guess not.
Meow, meoww.
Well, that's a cat living in luxury, I'd say.\nIt might even be eating better than me.
Itsuki-chan,\nlet's splurge on tonight's dinner for Futaro-kun.
Yes, let's treat him\nto all the delicious seafood from Okinawa.
Whaaa you're kidding?!
We won't allow any leftovers, okay?
Meow, meoww.
Okinawan fish is delicious,\nso maybe Maya's recommending it to us.
So, is Maya the signboard cat\nfor the market fisherman?
That's how she's promotes business to customers.\nMaya-chan, you're such a hard worker.
Meow.
Okay, let's have Maya-chan recommend a seafood feast\nfor tonight's dinner.
Great idea.\nWe have this chance, so let's indulge\nin all the delicious seafood from Okinawa.
Huh?
Alright, let's prepare a large boat-shaped platter\nfor Futaro-kun!
No, that's not what I meant...\nJust, don't go overboard, okay?
You're always so serious.\nYou've gotta lighten up, huh, Maya-chan?
Meow, meowww.
Ah, kitty left.
It was so friendly until just now,\nbut it left so easily.
Cats are said to be fickle. It's true, isn't it.
I wish it had stayed a bit longer.
Ichika, do you really like cats that much?
Not THAT much, but I like them nonetheless.\nI think all animals are cute.
Come to think of it,\nI think you said you like hippos before, Ichika.
Hippos? Really? That's kind of surprising.
Huh? Is it?\nI feel like a hippo and I are similar in some ways.
Huh?
Similar?
At least I don't think you're similar.
Actually, I think you're more like a sloth.\nThey spend most of their day sleeping.
Waaah, that's harsh! How can you say that to me,\nsuch a hard-working actress?
Ah, but he's got a point...
Itsuki?
No, I was just thinking hippos,\nmust have different sides to them as well.
Right, well, since Maya rejected me,\nshall we go visit some shops?
Yes, let's do that.
